failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_002: Flags replacement CEO compensation assumption as too low
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo questions the CIM's assumption that a replacement CEO would cost only $0.5M, noting that market-rate CEO compensation for a ~$87-90M revenue environmental services company would be meaningfully higher (in the range of $0.8M–$1.2M or similar). FAIL if the $0.5M replacement CEO figure is accepted without challenge.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_005: Recommends AR aging analysis based on DSO discrepancy
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo recommends requesting a detailed accounts receivable aging analysis to investigate the DSO discrepancy and assess potential collection issues or bad debt exposure. FAIL if no AR aging or receivables-related diligence request is made in connection with the DSO issue.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_009b: Notes Prewitt lacks employment agreement or non-compete
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo notes that Janet Prewitt has no employment agreement or non-compete. FAIL if the absence of an employment agreement or non-compete for Prewitt is not mentioned.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_012: Flags Meridian Lumber MSA expiration before expected closing
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo identifies that Meridian Lumber & Paper (#4 customer, $5.8M or 6.6% of revenue) has an MSA expiring December 2025, which is before or around the expected closing in Q4 2025. FAIL if the Meridian Lumber MSA expiration timing is not flagged.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_012: Quantifies revenue at risk from expired/expiring/at-will contracts
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo quantifies the combined revenue at risk from customers with expired (PNR $18.7M), expiring (Meridian $5.8M), or month-to-month (Willamette $4.9M) arrangements, totaling approximately $29-30M or roughly 34% of revenue. FAIL if the aggregate revenue at risk is not quantified.

failed_criteria.title: Correctly reports PFAS revenue trajectory (FY2022-FY2024)
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo reports at least two of the following three historical PFAS revenue figures within 10% of stated values: FY2022 ~$1.1M, FY2023 ~$3.4M, FY2024 ~$6.2M. FAIL if PFAS historical revenue is not referenced or fewer than two figures are within 10% of stated values.
